title: dryopteris humida
intro: Dryopteris humida, also known as the humid wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris humida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris humida can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis and skin conditions.
